report.summary: Built 2 learn guides: Symbiotic Protocol Restaking Guide and Modular Blockchain Stack Guide 2026, with full SEO optimization, structured data, and FAQ sections

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Symbiotic Protocol: $1.6B+ TVL, 70+ secured networks, 1,200+ operators across 45 countries; key 2026 innovation is Curator Markets (22% higher capital efficiency vs static staking); BTC accounts for ~30% of staked value via iBTC/Ditto; expanding into ZK-proof validation and MEV mitigation

Modular Blockchain Stack: DA market dominated by Celestia, EigenDA (100 MB/s throughput), and Avail (chain-agnostic); Gartner predicts 70% of new blockchain apps will use modular architectures by late 2026; Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon, StarkWare, and zkSync committed to Celestia integration; wrong DA layer choice can increase rollup costs by 55x

sections.title: Content Created
items: Symbiotic Protocol Restaking Guide (~3,200 words): covers protocol architecture (collateral, vaults, operators, networks), Curator Markets deep-dive, Symbiotic vs EigenLayer vs Karak comparison table, step-by-step restaking tutorial, risk analysis, 6 FAQs

Modular Blockchain Stack Guide 2026 (~3,400 words): covers modular vs monolithic architecture, four blockchain functions table, DA layer deep-dive (Celestia vs EigenDA vs Avail comparison table), execution layer (optimistic vs ZK vs sovereign rollups), settlement layer, cost/performance analysis, 2026 adoption data, 6 FAQs

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Symbiotic: title 'Symbiotic Protocol Guide 2026 — Permissionless Restaking Explained | degen0x' (69 chars), target keyword 'symbiotic protocol restaking', Article + FAQ JSON-LD schemas, 5 internal links (Karak guide, LRT guide, restaking AVS guide, DeFi insurance guide)

Modular: title 'Modular Blockchain Stack Guide 2026 — DA, Execution & Settlement Explained | degen0x' (78 chars), target keywords 'modular blockchain stack', 'data availability layer', Article + FAQ JSON-LD schemas, 8 internal links (Celestia, DA layer guide, blockchain trilemma, L1 vs L2, ZK proofs, Ethereum roadmap, appchains, Symbiotic cross-link)
Both pages added to PUBLISHED_PAGES in published-pages.ts (batch 8)
OpenGraph and Twitter card metadata configured for both pages
Breadcrumb components with proper hierarchy included
